zh: 高中的时候是理科生，后来误入教育学。
没什么兴趣爱好，喜欢睡觉。
好像总是莫名其妙地作出了错误的选择。
想学很多东西，但很难坚持下去。
如果时光能倒退，能重来，我一定要好好做选择，好好学习。
en: i was a science student in high school and somehow ended up studying education
i don't really have many hobbies. i like sleeping
somehow, i always seem to make the wrong choices
there are so many things i want to learn, but it's hard to keep going
if i could turn back time and start again, i'd choose more carefully and study much harder

description.zh: 一个蒸馏导师学术风格的小型网页 AI 实验
description.en: a small web ai experiment that distills a mentor's academic style

meta.zh: 2026 年 4 月 · 网页 AI

intro.zh: 这里用来放一些论文动态，也记录偶尔冒出来的想法和感悟。
intro.en: a quiet place for paper updates, stray ideas, and things i want to remember.

intro.zh: 邮件是找我最快的方式——或者在网上各个角落也能找到我。
intro.en: mail's the fastest way to reach me — or find me scattered around the internet.
